# AUTOGENERATED at runtime by noctalia from home/noctalia/templates/frottage-trigger.txt.
# Edits are overwritten on the next theme change.
#
# Trigger-only template: it carries no real config. Its post_hook
# (frottage-noctalia) downloads the frottage wallpaper variant matching the
# current mode and applies it via `noctalia msg wallpaper-set`. {{mode}} renders
# to dark|light and is passed to the hook as the authoritative current mode, so
# the dark/light frottage variant tracks every theme toggle (and the startup
# render). See modules/home-manager/desktops/noctalia-frottage.nix.
mode = {{mode}}
